message:
Enrich provisioning step logging, expand OAuth2/webhook test coverage, and add E2E evidence validation

provisioning.rs: enriched log_step() with requires_approval, prompt_type,
error_message, recovery_hint, duration_ms (via Instant timing), and
logged_at (RFC3339 timestamp) fields. All call sites updated to pass
the expanded parameters, providing comprehensive structured audit logs
for every provisioning step outcome including approval waits, user input
prompts, failures, and recoveries.

oauth2.rs (+77 lines): added test_authorization_code_pkce_full_lifecycle
_with_mock_server — end-to-end test of public client PKCE flow including
authorization URL generation with scopes, code_challenge verification,
token exchange with code_verifier, and response validation.

webhook provider.rs (+98 lines): added test_webhook_registration_routing
_and_secret_rotation_lifecycle — end-to-end test covering webhook
registration, challenge verification, and secret rotation flow with
mock server.

connector_descriptors.rs: minor formatting adjustment.

E2E compliance tests (GitLab, LinkedIn, Mailchimp): added
assert_report_logs_validate() JSONL evidence validation helper —
verifies stable timestamps, correlation IDs, duration, schema
compliance via validate_log_entry_value(), and clean scan_log_jsonl()
results. Brings these three suites in line with the evidence validation
pattern from BigQuery/Bitbucket/Dropbox.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
